name: Sweet and Sour Pork (Goo Lo Yuke)
recipeIngredient: 1 lb Pork butt cut into 1-inch pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the pork pieces with cornstarch until coated.
2. Heat oil in a wok or large skillet over medium-high heat.
3. Add the coated pork and stir-fry for about 5 minutes until browned on all sides.
4. Remove the pork from the pan and set aside.
5. In the same pan, add vegetables (bell peppers, carrots, onions) and cook for a few minutes.
6. Return the pork to the pan and pour in the sauce mixture (sour cream, vinegar, sugar, soy sauce).
7. Simmer for about 10-15 minutes until the sauce thickens and coats the pork.
8. Adjust seasoning as needed.
9. Serve hot over steamed rice or noodles.
